GOAnno4Bioc 0.0.2
  • Reference

GOAnno4Bioc

This package for R (>= 4.6.0) defines Bioconductor interfaces to Gene Ontology Annotation resources from GO Consortium.

  • An exemplary gaf.gz file from March 2026 is provided in inst/human

  • A parsing function, ingestGAF produces a tibble with the annotations
